message:
fix(tests): update assertions for new connectors, API renames, and connection cleanup

update_check.rs:
- Add .context() to the serde_json::to_string_pretty() call so
  serialization errors carry a descriptive message instead of a bare
  serde_json error.

agent_detection_completeness test:
- Update the expected connector count from 15 to 18 to reflect three
  new agent connectors that were added since the test was written.

e2e_pages test:
- Rename matches_pattern() calls to is_excluded() to match the API
  rename in pages/summary.rs.

pages_preview_integration test:
- Add explicit stream.shutdown(Both) calls after reading HTTP responses
  in all five test connection sites. This ensures the TCP connection is
  fully closed before the test moves on, preventing the preview server
  from accumulating half-open connections during test runs and matching
  the shutdown behavior now documented in the production preview handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
